title: Read URL params in handle_params/3, not mount
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/products_filter_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ProductsFilterLive). mount/3 must NOT read any URL parameters — return {:ok, assign(socket, :products, [])}. handle_params/3 must read %{"category" => category} and call MyApp.Catalog.list_products(category: category), assigning the result to :products. Include a default clause handle_params(_params, _url, socket).
tier_rationale: Canonical placement rule for URL-param-driven state. Well-documented idiom.
research_citation: Binary Noggin: 'Database queries should be placed in handle_params/3 rather than mount/3'
